sections.heading: Page 3
sections.text:
Bills of Sale (Registration) Act, 1961 (Chapter 191) Zambia
Zambia
Bills of Sale (Registration) Act, 1961
Chapter 191
Commenced on 11 August 1961
[This is the version of this document at 31 December 1996.]
[This legislation has been revised and consolidated by the Ministry of Legal Affairs of the
Government of the Republic of Zambia. This version is up-to-date as at 31st December 1996.
All subsequent amendments have been researched and applied by Laws.Africa for ZAMBIALII.]
[15 of 1961; Government Notice 497 of 1964]
An Act to remove certain doubts relating to the registration of Bills of Sale and for matters connected
therewith.
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Bills of Sale (Registration) Act, and shall be read as one with the Lands and
Deeds Registry Act.
[Cap. 185]
2. Non-application of certain provisions of the Bills of Sale Acts
It is hereby declared for the removal of doubt that the provisions of the Bills of Sale Acts, 1878-1882, of
the United Kingdom, requiring the registration and re-registration of Bills of Sale under those Acts, are
not in force and have not, since the commencement of the Lands and Deeds Registry Act, been in force in
Zambia.
[Cap. 185]
